transcript.text: The Hall of the Immortals song.
Come and be in my Hall of the Immortals.
Come and join me in my kingly court.
It is designed for the poor man because he can come to my kingdom.
I do not discriminate between the rich and the poor.
You can come sit on my left side, my right side, in my Hall, my Hall of the Immortal God-King-Humans.
The Hall of the Immortals is where the God-Kings dwell.
It is where we will thrive forevermore.
So come and giveth to be in my kingly court, and you shall be a god.
